A1.notes: All 12 major modules present with accurate key types and deps. 7-stage pipeline complete including request_started signal detail. Proposal correctly uses sync_capable/async_capable + __acall__, realistic risks.

A2.notes: 12 modules, precise key types including Query/SQLCompiler in db. 7-stage pipeline with correct process_view and process_template_response callouts. Most tool-efficient A-condition run (5 Bash calls).

A3.notes: 12 modules including contrib; cross_module_hubs cites accurate inbound counts (utils=85, http=60). 7-stage pipeline complete. Proposal correctly notes duplicate-with-third-party risk.

A4.notes: 12 modules, accurate dependencies and key types. 7-stage pipeline with precise types at each boundary. 5-risk proposal correctly identifies DEBUG-only query counting and async SynchronousOnlyOperation hazard.

A5.notes: 13 modules including contrib; all key types accurate. 7-stage pipeline complete. Proposal correctly uses MiddlewareMixin with sync/async dual pattern; 4 solid risks.

B1.notes: core module described as 'Core utilities and exceptions' with key types ImproperlyConfigured/ValidationError only; BaseHandler/WSGIHandler/ASGIHandler absent entirely. No apps module. 8-stage pipeline complete but intermediate types thin. Proposal references db/utils.py (not needed) and log_response() as structured-log pattern (incorrect).

B2.notes: db module key_types list only transaction-layer types (Atomic, TransactionManagementError, connections), omitting Model/QuerySet/Manager/Field/SQLCompiler — a fundamental mischaracterization of the ORM. views key_types missing the View base class. 8-stage pipeline is correctly ordered but intermediate types sparse. Proposal unnecessarily proposes modifying wsgi.py/asgi.py/db/utils.py.

B3.notes: db module key_types limited to connection-layer types (connections, ConnectionHandler, ConnectionRouter), omitting Model/QuerySet/Field. Pipeline trace omits the middleware request-processing phase entirely — jumps from HTTP parsing directly to URL resolution. Proposal mentions modifying core/handlers/base.py which is not required.

B4.notes: conf, apps, dispatch, and forms modules absent from module map (8 modules only). 9-stage pipeline is detailed and correct with per-stage operations listed. Proposal adds unnecessary files (core/handlers/base.py) and over-engineers with configurable attributes; 6 risks include one (privacy/timing exposure) that is marginal.

B5.notes: core module omits BaseHandler/WSGIHandler/ASGIHandler from key_types. db key_types missing Model/QuerySet/Manager. Pipeline trace places ORM query execution (stage 6) after middleware response phase (stage 5), inverting actual execution order. Proposal cites django.test.utils.CaptureQueriesContext for production use, which is a test utility.

C1.notes: 12 modules with precise sub-module deps (core.signals, utils.log, utils.module_loading in core.handlers). 7-stage pipeline complete; correctly identifies make_view_atomic and ATOMIC_REQUESTS. Proposal correctly uses MiddlewareMixin process_request/process_response; identifies execute_wrapper as production query-counting alternative.

C2.notes: 12 modules; cross_module_hubs correctly identifies core.exceptions as a third hub (pure exception vocabulary with 20 inbound deps). 8-stage pipeline includes async/sync adaptation detail via asgiref. Proposal correctly notes async thread-local connection.queries issue and 404 resolver_match=None case.

C3.notes: 12 modules; urls includes Resolver404/NoReverseMatch in key_types showing depth. 8-stage pipeline with make_view_atomic and process_view hooks. Proposal explicitly references CsrfViewMiddleware __call__ override as the pattern for accurate timing; notes StreamingHttpResponse timing inaccuracy risk.

C4.notes: 12 modules; django.http cited as hub with 40 inbound deps (highest inbound). 8-stage pipeline complete with correct WSGI/ASGI output stage. Proposal uses MiddlewareMixin dual sync/async; minor: recommends asyncio.get_event_loop().time() (deprecated) but shows correct async awareness.

C5.notes: 12 modules; identifies process_view as an explicit pipeline stage (stage 4). 8-stage pipeline most complete trace. Proposal correctly sets async_capable=True/sync_capable=True; notes ATOMIC_REQUESTS integration and state-on-request concurrency safety.
